message:
refactor(search): simplify index stats collection and fix formatting in search_v3

Index stats optimization (fetch_index_message_stats): Replace the
two-query pattern (Count collector + TopDocs) with a single-query
approach that uses searcher.num_docs() for the total document count and
only runs the TopDocs query for the max-id lookup. This avoids executing
a separate TermQuery just to count documents when the searcher already
exposes the segment-level doc count directly. Also adds an early return
when the index is empty, skipping the unnecessary TermQuery entirely.

Formatting fixes: Reformat several lines to comply with rustfmt style
rules — specifically the u64::try_from(msg.id) error mapping chains in
add_indexable_message() and upsert_indexable_message(), the
choose_backfill_plan() function signature, the
invalidate_search_cache() call in backfill_from_db(), and the assertion
in the legacy document replacement test. Remove the now-unused Count
import from tantivy::collector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
